changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.comment: Remove Ascenscia integration data: UserConnection tokens

changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.comment: Remove Ascenscia integration data: AppConfigElement, AppConfigElementSet, UserAppConfig

changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.sql: delete from AppConfigElementDescriptor where app_id = ( select id from App where name = 'app.ascenscia');

changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.comment: Remove Ascenscia integration data: SystemPropertyValue and SystemProperty for ascenscia.available

changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.comment: Remove Ascenscia integration data: PropertyDescriptors and App
changeSet.sql:
delete from PropertyDescriptor where name in ('ascenscia.available', 'ASCENSCIA_APIKEY');
delete from App where name = 'app.ascenscia';
